question: Which year saw the highest number of stolen vehicle incidents in Los Angeles between 2010 to 2019? During that peak year, which area had the most arrests for driving under the influence? Finally, how many stolen vehicles were reported in that specific area in 2020? Only report the number of the stolen vehicles. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/crime-data-from-2010-to-2019/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df = df[df["Crm Cd Desc"] == "VEHICLE - STOLEN"].copy()
df["DATE OCC"] = pd.to_datetime(df["DATE OCC"], errors="coerce")
df = df[df["DATE OCC"].dt.year.between(2010, 2019, inclusive="both")]
answer = df.groupby(df["DATE OCC"].dt.year).size().sort_values(ascending=False).index[0]
print(int(answer))
answer = str(answer)
1.subquestion: From 2010 to 2019, which year has the most Los Angeles incidents with crime description "VEHICLE - STOLEN"?

2.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/arrest-data-from-2010-to-2019/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df["Arrest Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Arrest Date"], errors="coerce")
df = df[
    (df["Arrest Date"].dt.year == 2016)
    & (df["Charge Group Description"] == "Driving Under Influence")
]
answer = df.groupby("Area Name").size().sort_values(ascending=False).index[0]
print(answer)
2.subquestion: In <node_1 answer> Los Angeles arrest records, which area has the most arrests in the charge group "Driving Under Influence"?

3.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/lapd-ripa-ab-953-stop-incident-details-from-7-1-2018-to-present/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df = df[df["Area Name"] == "Van Nuys"].copy()
answer = pd.to_numeric(df["Area ID"], errors="coerce").dropna().astype(int).mode().iloc[0]
print(int(answer))
answer = str(answer)
3.subquestion: Using LAPD stop-incident records collected under California's RIPA program, what numeric Area ID corresponds to area name <node_2 answer> (answer as an integer)?

5.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/crime-data-from-2020-to-present/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df["DATE OCC"] = pd.to_datetime(df["DATE OCC"], errors="coerce")
df = df[
    (df["DATE OCC"].dt.year == 2020)
    & (pd.to_numeric(df["AREA"], errors="coerce") == 9)
    & (pd.to_numeric(df["Crm Cd"], errors="coerce") == 510)
]
answer = len(df)
print(int(answer))
answer = str(answer)
5.subquestion: Using the 2020 to present Los Angeles crime records, in 2020 how many incidents with crime code <node_4 answer> occurred in Area ID <node_3 answer>?

reasoning_chain: Node 1: In 2010 to 2019 LA crime records, the year with the most VEHICLE - STOLEN incidents -> 2016.
Node 2 depends on node 1: In 2016 arrests, the area with the most Driving Under Influence arrests -> Van Nuys.
Node 3 depends on node 2: In LAPD RIPA stop-incident records, Van Nuys corresponds to Area ID 9.
Node 4: In Los Angeles crime records, VEHICLE - STOLEN corresponds to crime code 510.
Node 5 depends on nodes 3-4: In 2020 crime records for Area ID 9, incident count where Crm Cd = 510 -> 915.
